No incumbent-aware anchored selection mode, no rolling_admission_blocked contract, artifact still reports validation_only selection.

Anchored search wrapper and dedicated test file are both missing.
Comparison writer is not yet wired to anchored four-sleeve artifacts or gate-status coverage.
Current baseline targeted tests/lint/compile checks pass on reviewed files.
